title: agropyron elongatum subsp. corsicum
intro: Agropyron elongatum subsp. corsicum, also known as Corsican wheat-grass, is a subspecies of the perennial grass Agropyron elongatum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Corsican wheat-grass include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Corsican wheat-grass can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
